title: Bidens rueppellii
taxonomy: Bidens rueppellii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. It is classified as a member of the genus Bidens, which includes over 250 species of plants. Bidens rueppellii is native to East Africa and has been observed growing in regions with a warm and dry climate. The plant's classification is further divided into several subcategories, including its tribe and order, which are both part of the larger Asteridae clade. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Bidens rueppellii is closely related to other plants in this family, such as dandelions and thistles.
